response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and 15+ years of diverse technical experience, this role has critical misalignments. Native-level Japanese is explicitly required—not mentioned on the resume. The position requires specialized expertise in embedded networking security (MACsec, 802.1X, LAN switches, kernel vulnerabilities), which is not evident in his background. His career trajectory shows web, backend, and some embedded systems work, but lacks the networking security focus essential for this mid-senior role. The absence of specific networking protocol experience, security technology background, and demonstrated low-level C expertise further compounds the mismatch.
strengths: 15+ years of demonstrable software development experience across multiple domains and languages demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals
Proven systems-level work including hardware control, low-latency optimization, and infrastructure experience shows capability with complex technical challenges
Track record of mentoring, technical leadership, and creating educational content indicates ability to collaborate effectively across teams
concerns: No mention of native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is an explicit required qualification

Career background primarily in web and backend development (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with no demonstrated experience in embedded networking security, LAN switches, or security protocols like MACsec and 802.1X
No evidence of Linux kernel source modification, security technology implementation, or networking protocol expertise (SNMP, NETCONF, L2/L3 networking fundamentals)

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise mismatch—web/backend focus vs. embedded networking security requirement
Strong general engineering capabilities and systems-level experience
